docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY I/PRO CORPORATION BY A. KAPLAN, OFFICER AS TO DEFENDANT ZIMMERMANN NIELSEN & COLLEAGUES ZIMMERMANN ESQ, GERD ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-05-2009 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
